'''''Contel''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Container transport]]. The transport was part of convoy [[Rope 17]], which was supposed to upgrade the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. ''Contel'' carried medical supplies for the personnel of the factory. Despite being attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders, ''Contel'' managed to deliver its cargo and escape into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
